_comment: Odoo 16 differentiation from odoo-17 base: Python 3.10 baseline, OWL 2.x rewrite mainstream, account.move refactor (account.invoice → account.move unification completed), @api.multi removed. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack as it's closer to modern era than legacy odoo-12. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-16/ when v16-specific .mdc content is authored.
description: Odoo 16 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.10+, OWL 2.x rewrite mainstream, @api.multi REMOVED, account.move refactor. Modern era; reuses odoo-17 rule pack.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-16/ is authored. v16 is the first major OWL2 release — patterns very close to v17.
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn (informational). Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 16 removed @api.multi — recordset is the default. Methods iterating self need no decorator; @api.multi import/usage is dead.
invariants_overlay.rationale: @api.multi was removed by Odoo 16 (recordset became the default in the v15→v16 modernization). Code ported from v12 must drop @api.multi and rely on the recordset default; the looping/decorator structure must remain intentional. Fix when violated: restore the @api.* decorator or `for rec in self` loop the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 16 mainstreamed OWL 2.x — JS components must carry the `/** @odoo-module **/` header and extend Component from @odoo/owl; jQuery/web.Widget is removed for new code.
invariants_overlay.rationale: OWL 2.x is the default frontend framework from v16. New JS must declare `/** @odoo-module **/` so the asset loader treats it as an ESM OWL component; legacy `odoo.define`/jQuery widgets are gone for new code. Fix when violated: restore the `/** @odoo-module **/` header the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 16 completed the account.invoice → account.move unification — invoices/bills are account.move records (move_type), not the removed account.invoice model.
invariants_overlay.rationale: The `account.invoice` model was unified into `account.move` (distinguished by `move_type`) during the account refactor finalized by v16. Code referencing `account.invoice` will fail to resolve the model. Fix when violated: restore the `account.move` reference / `move_type` filter the edit dropped.
